title: Best Time to Visit Azerbaijan: A Complete Seasonal Guide
author: Local Travel Expert
excerpt: Discover the perfect time to explore Azerbaijan's diverse landscapes, from the Caspian Sea coast to the Caucasus Mountains.
content: Azerbaijan offers a unique blend of experiences throughout the year. Spring (April-June) brings blooming flowers and mild temperatures, perfect for exploring Baku and the countryside. Summer (July-August) is hot but ideal for beach resorts in Lankaran and mountain hiking. Autumn (September-October) offers colorful foliage and harvest festivals. Winter (November-March) brings snow to the mountains for skiing, while Baku remains relatively mild.
